title: digitaria bechuanica
intro: Digitaria bechuanica, also known as the Southern Crab Grass, is a type of grass native to Southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of the aforementioned conditions.
